label: remove visual audio reactivity
notes: Stripped both visual audio bindings in the orb. lvc_bg.saturationmult was 1.0 + audio_energy*0.7, now hard-set to 1.0 (no audio-driven saturation pump). glsl_orb.vec2valuew (the glow_energy uniform / ca_param.w in shader, drives the warm inner glow) was = audio_energy, now hard-set to 0.0 (kills the warm purple inner glow entirely — sphereRGB += glowColor * glowFall * 0 = 0). Export audio routing on moviefileout_export.audiochop unchanged so rendered output still carries sound. Future audio reactivity will be wired into the motes physics (G, mass, etc) instead of into the orb shader.
